steps.title: Recognize what the goal requires
steps.content:
The student wants to explain an advantage that comes from the archive being digital/online.

The notes mention two key benefits: scholars have more access to documents, and the digitization meant documents didn't need to be removed from their countries of origin.

An effective answer must explicitly connect the online format to one or both of these advantages.

steps.title: Find the choice that delivers
steps.content:
The matching choice is the only one that explicitly states “by offering online versions” and connects this digital format directly to both advantages: more access to these materials without removing them from their countries of origin.

The other choices focus on what the archive contains or who led it, but none explains how the digital format produces a benefit.

B is correct.
